title: Software Update - DFU - Can be completed for standalone headsets
scenario: DFU completes successfully for standalone headset via Device Settings > Software in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
Ensure the headset is paired and connected to the app via Bluetooth.
Tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
Scroll to and tap on Software.
Tap the Update button (or Check for Update).
Wait for the DFU process to complete. Do not disconnect the headset or close the app during the update.
expected: The headset firmware is updated to the latest version. The app displays a success message and the new firmware version number in Device Settings > Software.
